test-method.name: testButtons
test-method.description: TC-LGN-01: Login or signup buttons should be present

test-method.name: testInputFields
test-method.description: TC-LGN-02: Assure email/username & password input fields are present

test-method.name: testForgotPassword
test-method.description: TC-LGN-03: Assure forgot password link is present

test-method.name: testInvalidLogin
test-method.description: TC-LGN-04: Assure system rejects wrong credentials

test-method.name: testValidLogin
test-method.description: TC-LGN-05: Assure user can login with valid credentials

test-method.name: testSearchPage
test-method.description: TC-SR-01: Assure search page loads

test-method.name: testSettingsPageLoads
test-method.description: TC-ST-01: Settings page loads correctly

test-method.name: testSubtitleLanguage
test-method.description: TC-ST-02: User can change subtitle language preference

test-method.name: testNotifSettings
test-method.description: TC-ST-03: User can toggle notification settings

test-method.name: testChangeAccountInfo
test-method.description: TC-ST-04: User should be able to change email info if needed

test-method.name: testCustomerSupport
test-method.description: TC-ST-05: User can access customer support link

test-method.name: titleANDlogo
test-method.description: TC-HP-01: Assure homepage displays title & logo

test-method.name: testCarousel
test-method.description: TC-HP-02: Test home page carousel

test-method.name: testFooterLinks
test-method.description: TC-HP-04: Assure home page has footer with extra links

test-method.name: testContinueWatching
test-method.description: TC-HP-03: Assure Continue Watching section is displayed

test-method.name: testHPcontent
test-method.description: TC-HP-05: Assure home page has adequate content

test-method.name: testLogoNav
test-method.description: TC-NAV-01: Assure Crunchyroll logo returns user to homepage

test-method.name: navLinks
test-method.description: TC-NAV-02: Assure there is an easy navigation bar with multiple links

test-method.name: watchlistNav
test-method.description: TC-NAV-03: Assure easy navigation to watchlists

test-method.name: navByCategory
test-method.description: TC-NAV-04: Assure there is a category/genre filter/easy navigation

test-method.name: searchNav
test-method.description: TC-NAV-05: Assure nav has a search icon/bar

test-method.name: testLogout
test-method.description: TC-PM-01: Assure user can log out and log back in

test-method.name: addNewUser
test-method.description: TC-PM-02: Assure user can add new user profile to account

test-method.name: editUserProfile
test-method.description: TC-PM-03: Assure user can edit existing user profile

test-method.name: deleteUserProfile
test-method.description: TC-PM-04: Assure user can delete user profile

test-method.name: chooseProfile
test-method.description: TC-PM-05: Assure user can choose their own profile

test-method.name: seriesInfo
test-method.description: TC-VP-01: Verify series info properly displays

test-method.name: episodeDetails
test-method.description: TC-VP-02: Verify episode details display correctly

test-method.name: seasonsMenu
test-method.description: TC-VP-03: Verify drop down menu for seasons

test-method.name: testPlayback
test-method.description: TC-VP-04: Test playback on episode 146

test-method.name: continueWatching
test-method.description: TC-VP-05: Test continue watching – assure playback works from home feed
